svg.aria-label: Public PC safe login cover with passkey OTP password manager and session hygiene
svg.title: Safe public PC login with passkey OTP and password manager

g.text: No reusable secret : no typed password
Biometric or device key signs challenge locally
Move away from SMS OTP on shared machines
Use unique 20+ char secrets with zero-knowledge vault
Prefer passkey and avoid save-password prompts
Review active sessions after kiosk or cafe PC use
